name: DemandHub
description:
DemandHub helps boost customer engagement. It goes way beyond just managing reviews and covers everything from scheduling appointments and sending reminders to conducting surveys, chatting online, and even text marketing. Plus, it helps businesses manage their reputation across multiple locations. 

Source: Demandhub.com

Features:

➡️Helps automate using various message templates 

➡️Integrates with external tools to automate processes

Benefits: 

✅Great customer service

✅Can review, monitor, and respond to reviews under a single roof

✅Getting reviews is very easy

Cons:

❌Offers limited features as compared to its competitors

❌Limited templates to offer

❌ Copy-pasting texts can be really difficult 

‍

Offers custom pricing.
what_people_say:
Likes: 

“Demandhub has some really useful features all in one place rather than having multiple for a business. We really like the capability to see all incoming messages from our social media, website, and client messages all in one place. As well as out client review messages and reminders being automatic.”

‍

Dislikes:

“Sometimes the interface can be glitchy. We have it set up so that incoming messages come up as desktop notifications. Sometimes there is a huge delay in when the message has come in and when we are notified. We also find that we often have to refresh the page to see new messages. I don't like that the templates have changed into alphabetical order. It would be much easier and quicker to have them listed in the order of most used.”

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
